name: Clean Energy Technologies, Inc.
business: Clean Energy Technologies develops renewable energy products and solutions including waste heat recovery systems using its patented Clean Cycle generator, waste-to-energy solutions via HTAP pyrolysis technology, and natural gas trading in China. The company serves industrial, municipal, and commercial customers in North America, Europe, and Asia, offering turnkey energy solutions for power generation, energy efficiency, and clean fuel production.
sellsTo: urban and industrial users in China

exposures.sentence: To support the growing energy demands of data centers, we have added power generation and Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) capabilities to provide immediate and reliable power.
To support the growing energy demands of data centers, we have added power generation and Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) capabilities to provide immediate and reliable power.
We develop renewable energy products and solutions and establish partnerships in renewable energy that make environmental and economic sense.
CETY HK sources and supplies natural gas to industrial customers and municipalities through its PRC subsidiaries.

catalysts.sentence: The Vermont Renewable Gas project is one of the many renewable energy processing facilities we plan to commission.

catalysts.event: Planned joint venture with Shenzhen Gas
catalysts.sentence: CETY HK has entered into a framework agreement with Shenzhen Gas (Hong Kong) International Co. Ltd. (Shenzhen Gas) to establish a joint venture focused on the acquisition of natural gas pipeline operator assets, primarily located in southwestern China.

tamClaims.claim: Waste-to-energy market projected to reach approximately $100 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: The global waste-to-energy market has demonstrated steady growth and is projected to reach approximately $80 100 billion by 2030, growing at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 6 7% over the forecast period.

tamClaims.claim: Waste heat recovery market projected to reach approximately $110 130 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: Recent industry estimates place the market at approximately $65 75 billion in the mid-2020s, with projections to reach approximately $110 130 billion by 2030, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 7 9%.
